reviews.author: Kenneth Durbin
reviews.text: After building our house, we contacted Mark at Dapper AV Solutions. We requested his help with selecting AV brands and we provided our budget. Mark resourced the material and completed the installation quickly. He is methodical and you can see that he cares to do it right and provide for you the best solution. He saved us money and provided an outstanding entertainment system. We are extremely happy. So much so, that years later we called him back for an upgrade. He installed our 85” system. I trust him and you should too.
